name: xcapi

metadata.name: xcapi
metadata.summary: Python library for communicating with the xray grpc api

documentation:
# Xcapi

## Description

Python library for communicating with the xray core grpc api

Follow xray core version updates

Use python 3.12

## Install
```bash
pip install xcapi
```
## Usage
[Example](https://github.com/Acer-Platanoides/xcapi/tree/main/test)

Override target destination if sniff'ed protocol is in the given list.
Supported values are "http", "tls", "fakedns".

Can be used to support SMTP like protocol where server send the first message.

List of GeoIPs for target IP address matching. If this entry exists, the cidr above will have no effect.
GeoIP fields with the same country code are supposed to contain exactly same content.
They will be merged during runtime. For customized GeoIPs, please leave country code empty.

documentation: List of ports for source port matching.

documentation: Resolve to IP if the domain doesn't match any rules.

class_variables.name: xcapi.xray.app.router.config_pb.Config.DomainStrategy.IpOnDemand
documentation: Resolve to IP if any rule requires IP matching.

modules.name: xcapi.xray.app.router.command.command_pb
documentation: Generated by the protocol buffer compiler.  DO NOT EDIT!

classes.name: xcapi.xray.app.router.command.command_pb.RoutingContext
documentation:
RoutingContext is the context with information relative to routing process.
It conforms to the structure of xray.features.routing.Context and xray.features.routing.Route.

classes.name: xcapi.xray.app.router.command.command_pb.SubscribeRoutingStatsRequest
documentation:
SubscribeRoutingStatsRequest subscribes to routing statistics channel if opened by xray-core.

* FieldSelectors selects a subset of fields in routing statistics to return.

Valid selectors:
    - inbound: Selects connection's inbound tag.
    - network: Selects connection's network.
    - ip: Equivalent as "ip_source" and "ip_target", selects both source and target IP.
    - port: Equivalent as "port_source" and "port_target", selects both source and target port.
    - domain: Selects target domain.
    - protocol: Select connection's protocol.
    - user: Select connection's inbound user email.
    - attributes: Select connection's additional attributes.
    - outbound: Equivalent as "outbound" and "outbound_group", select both outbound tag and outbound group tags.
* If FieldSelectors is left empty, all fields will be returned.

classes.name: xcapi.xray.app.router.command.command_pb.TestRouteRequest
documentation:
TestRouteRequest manually tests a routing result according to the routing context message.
    * RoutingContext is the routing message without outbound information.
    * FieldSelectors selects the fields to return in the routing result. All fields are returned if left empty.
    * PublishResult broadcasts the routing result to routing statistics channel if set true.

class_variables.name: xcapi.xray.transport.internet.tls.config_pb.Config.next_protocol
documentation: Lists of string as ALPN values.

class_variables.name: xcapi.xray.transport.internet.tls.config_pb.Config.enable_session_resumption
documentation: Whether or not to enable session (ticket) resumption.

class_variables.name: xcapi.xray.transport.internet.tls.config_pb.Config.disable_system_root
documentation: If true, root certificates on the system will not be loaded for verification

class_variables.name: xcapi.xray.transport.internet.tls.config_pb.Config.cipher_suites
documentation: Specify cipher suites, except for TLS 1.3.

class_variables.name: xcapi.xray.transport.internet.tls.config_pb.Config.pinned_peer_certificate_chain_sha256
documentation:
A pinned certificate chain sha256 hash.
If the server's hash does not match this value, the connection will be aborted.
This value replace allow_insecure.

class_variables.name: xcapi.xray.transport.internet.tls.config_pb.Config.pinned_peer_certificate_public_key_sha256
documentation:
A pinned certificate public key sha256 hash.
If the server's public key hash does not match this value, the connection will be aborted.
This value replace allow_insecure.

modules.name: xcapi.xray.transport.internet.tcp.config_pb
documentation: Generated by the protocol buffer compiler.  DO NOT EDIT!

modules.name: xcapi.xray.transport.internet.http.config_pb
documentation: Generated by the protocol buffer compiler.  DO NOT EDIT!

modules.name: xcapi.xray.core.config_pb
documentation: Generated by the protocol buffer compiler.  DO NOT EDIT!

classes.name: xcapi.xray.core.config_pb.InboundHandlerConfig

class_variables.name: xcapi.xray.core.config_pb.InboundHandlerConfig.tag
documentation: Tag of the inbound handler. The tag must be unique among all inbound handlers

class_variables.name: xcapi.xray.core.config_pb.InboundHandlerConfig.receiver_settings
documentation: Settings for how this inbound proxy is handled.

class_variables.name: xcapi.xray.core.config_pb.InboundHandlerConfig.proxy_settings
documentation: Settings for inbound proxy. Must be one of the inbound proxies.
InboundHandlerConfig is the configuration for inbound handler.

classes.name: xcapi.xray.core.config_pb.OutboundHandlerConfig

class_variables.name: xcapi.xray.core.config_pb.OutboundHandlerConfig.sender_settings
documentation: Settings for how to dial connection for this outbound handler.

class_variables.name: xcapi.xray.core.config_pb.OutboundHandlerConfig.proxy_settings
documentation: Settings for this outbound proxy. Must be one of the outbound proxies.

class_variables.name: xcapi.xray.core.config_pb.OutboundHandlerConfig.expire
documentation: If not zero, this outbound will be expired in seconds. Not used for now.

class_variables.name: xcapi.xray.core.config_pb.OutboundHandlerConfig.comment
documentation: Comment of this outbound handler. Not used for now.
OutboundHandlerConfig is the configuration for outbound handler.

classes.name: xcapi.xray.core.config_pb.Config

class_variables.name: xcapi.xray.core.config_pb.Config.inbound
documentation: Inbound handler configurations. Must have at least one item.

class_variables.name: xcapi.xray.core.config_pb.Config.outbound
documentation: Outbound handler configurations. Must have at least one item. The first item is used as default for routing.

class_variables.name: xcapi.xray.core.config_pb.Config.app
documentation:
App is for configurations of all features in Xray. A feature must 
implement the Feature interface, and its config type must be registered
through common.RegisterConfig.

class_variables.name: xcapi.xray.core.config_pb.Config.extension
documentation:
Configuration for extensions. The config may not work if corresponding
extension is not loaded into Xray. Xray will ignore such config during
initialization.
Config is the master config of Xray. Xray takes this config as input and functions accordingly.
